design_philosophy: Civic-tech and environmental governance. WANA must feel like a protective early warning system. Modern, approachable, trustworthy, and lightweight. Low-bandwidth optimized with card-based layouts and progressive disclosure.

typography.instructions: Avoid Inter for headings. Keep hierarchy clear. Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text.

colors.instructions: Use earthy, calm tones. Never use pure red for alerts; use Terracotta (#B75D46). Use Golden Ochre (#D49A36) for warnings. Do not use pure black (#000000); use Charcoal Gray (#1C1B1A). Background should be a soft beige to reduce eye strain.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Generous padding for breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid protocol Mode B (Control Room) for dashboards. Compact, strict hierarchy, exception-first layout.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Bento Grid protocol Mode A (Tetris) for landing pages. Asymmetric, breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Flat solid surfaces with subtle 1px border (border-border), no heavy shadows. Max 8px border-radius (rounded-md).
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Sticky top nav with solid background (bg-[#F7F5F0]/90) and backdrop blur to prevent text collision on scroll.

components.strategy: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Use Shadcn UI for interactive elements (Dropdowns, Tables, Dialogs). Go cardless or flat-rectangular where possible to feel like a document rather than a SaaS toy.
components.buttons: Primary CTA uses bg-[#1C3F2B]. Add subtle hover states (e.g., hover:bg-[#1C3F2B]/90) and ensure clear focus rings for accessibility.
components.status_labels: Crucial for early warning. Pair color with explicit text ('Potential Impact', 'Confirmed Impact'). Example: bg-[#B75D46]/10 text-[#B75D46] for critical.
components.map: Leaflet with OpenStreetMap. Lightweight. Keep UI controls minimal and overlaid with crystal glassmorphism.
components.ai_generator: Show explainable AI elements. Confidence indicators, source data citations, clear 'What this means' summary cards.

icons.style: Minimal, functional, 2px stroke, avoid decorative icons in dense data tables.

motion_and_interaction.philosophy: Minimalist and purposeful. No flashy animations.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle background color shifts and -translate-y-[1px] for cards.

hero_background.description: Lush misty tropical rainforest landscape in Indonesia. Use for Landing Page hero background with an overlay to ensure text legibility (max bg-black/50 or dark green gradient).

about_community.description: Diverse group of adults and children gather under a tree for a community meeting. Use for About or Theory of Change page to represent indigenous communities and paralegals.

legal_documents.description: Man writing on paper/legal documents. Use as visual accent for the AI Impact Brief Generator or Evidence Pack Workflow section.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, map overlays, AI summaries) must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-regulation-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a bilingual (ID/EN) hybrid multi-page application using React/Tailwind/Shadcn.
Prioritize mobile-first layout and low-bandwidth considerations (avoid heavy libraries if not strictly needed; use Leaflet).
Ensure all text has a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against backgrounds.
Implement the 'Regulatory Monitor Dashboard' using a table with progressive disclosure (Issue triage cards, Exception-first layout).
For the Map, use Leaflet and ensure indigenous territory overlap is visually clear but lightweight.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for Landing/About pages (Bento mode A). Use Shadcn components for Dashboard/Generator/Evidence workflows.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as requested.
Follow the specified color palette exactly. Do not use generic 'blue' for links or buttons.
